title: Structura: AI-assisted vectorisation of photogrammetric excavation data
description: Structura is a workflow application for the vectorisation step of an archaeological excavation pipeline. It ingests georeferenced photogrammetric raster products (orthophoto, DEM) from an upstream WebODM/OpenDroneMap survey and produces georeferenced vector geometry for a PostGIS excavation database. It covers multiple tracks: 2D segmentation of stones and surfaces from the orthophoto (SAM, Cellpose, classical CV), 2.5D wall and edge tracing from the DEM, profile/section strata segmentation, and temporal integration of daily captures via PostGIS overlay/intersect, for stratified, complex excavation scenes.
